title: Hanging Around
lyrics: Can't you hear it when the feeling goes in? Can't you know the feeling when the feeling goes in? In your mind, here we are on the run I walked into the room the other day Look who's shaking baby Seems you were wondering about your life And where it puts an end of mine If you stay around with me There's some things you just can't imagine It's positive baby, it can't be tragedy If you see me the right way You see me all the way In the right way In the things that I say to you Of being free baby What I'm saying to you What I'm saying that we're walking into the dark ways Of our always And the nevers That's not the way we need to talk to you Get down in the shoes Get ready Never being more than you used to be Remember when I was all in you And you were all in me And we were like one together A vibration of Love And love That I dance when I'm done How can you ever in a second Are you just born with the thought of me Or are you not able to see That other people can't be the one to make you pleased You gotta be pleased with me With me Ooh baby, yeah Oh baby, yeah Come spend some time with me Ooh yeah When you hear a little bit of heartache And it's beating and it gets a little slow Then that, you got to catch up your feet Find a solution To not enjoy life Don't be just here breathing air Instead of making a difference In the world Cause it's always all been me So don't be so messed up in your brain Thinking that I'm gonna call you insane It's okay, you're gonna be able to run away And make a wish that you You don't understand me Might as well ban me And have to live the way That you would say on this day Oh Maybe let love play Love play, love play Instead of controlling all the time Hey I always have in my mind I always gotta end something properly, why? I don't know, maybe cause it's just a groove And every song is just a groove
